item.command:
/bin/zsh -lc "set -e
root='/Users/za/Documents/PROMPTER/longhorizon-work/scenario-06'
plan=\""'$root/migration/plan.json"
docs="$root/docs/migration.md"
skills/semantic-diff/tools/semdiff-cli read "$plan" --session scenario-06-post-compact-contradiction --meta >/dev/null
skills/semantic-diff/tools/semdiff-cli read "$docs" --session scenario-06-post-compact-contradiction --meta >/dev/null
printf '"'PLAN_DECISIONS\\n'
jq -r '\"schema_version=\\(.schema_version)\", \"strategy=\\(.strategy)\", \"batch_size=\\(.batch_size)\", \"rollback_error_rate=\\(.rollback_error_rate)\", \"dry_run_first=\\(.dry_run_first)\", \"owner=\\(.owner)\", \"safety_conditions[0]=\\(.safety_conditions[0])\"' \""'$plan"
printf '"'DOC_MATCHES\\n'
for pair in \\
  'schema_version|Schema version "'`1`'"' \\
  'strategy|"'`canary` strategy'"' \\
  'batch_size|batch size "'`25`'"' \\
  'rollback_error_rate|rollback error rate "'`0.02`'"' \\
  'dry_run_first|"'`dry_run_first` set to `true`'"' \\
  'owner|owner is "'`data-platform`'"' \\
  'safety_conditions[0]|legacy_id is preserved through phase 3'; do
  label="'${pair%%|*}
  token=${pair#*|}
  rg -F -- "$token" "$docs" >/dev/null
  printf '"'%s=PASS\\n' \""'$label"
done
if rg -n -uu '"'big_bang|big-bang' \""'$root"; then
  printf '"'stale_strategy_absent=FAIL\\n'
  exit 1
else
  printf 'stale_strategy_absent=PASS\\n'
fi
printf 'POST_COMPACTION_ARTIFACT_CONTRADICTIONS=0\\n'"
